name: K8s Dev Environment
postCreateCommand: curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/k3d-io/k3d/main/install.sh | bash && curl -LO https://dl.k8s.io/release/$(curl -L -s https://dl.k8s.io/release/stable.txt)/bin/linux/amd64/kubectl && chmod +x kubectl && sudo mv kubectl /usr/local/bin/ && curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/helm/helm/main/scripts/get-helm-3 | bash
